title: rubus henryi var. sozostylus
intro: Rubus henryi var. sozostylus, also known as the Henry's raspberry or golden raspberry, is a deciduous shrub belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae) and native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus henryi var. sozostylus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to protect against cardiovascular disease, cancer, and other chronic conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are used to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of menopause.
